prompt: Translate this to French: When people don't see moose as potentially dangerous, they may approach too closely and put themselves at risk.
reference: Lorsque les gens ne considèrent pas les élans comme potentiellement dangereux, ils peuvent s'approcher de trop près et se mettre en péril.
source_text: When people don't see moose as potentially dangerous, they may approach too closely and put themselves at risk.

prompt: Translate this to French: Drink alcoholic drinks with moderation. Alcohol affects everyone differently, and knowing your limit is very important.
reference: Buvez des boissons alcoolisées avec modération. L'alcool a des effets différents sur chacun, et il est très important de connaître ses limites.
source_text: Drink alcoholic drinks with moderation. Alcohol affects everyone differently, and knowing your limit is very important.

prompt: Translate this to French: Possible long term health events from excessive drinking can include liver damage and even blindness and death. The potential danger is increased when consuming illegally produced alcohol.
reference: Parmi les problèmes de santé possibles à long terme dus à l’alcoolisme, on peut citer les dégâts sur le foie, mais aussi la cécité et la mort. Le danger potentiel est accru en cas de consommation d’alcool fabriqué illégalement.
source_text: Possible long term health events from excessive drinking can include liver damage and even blindness and death. The potential danger is increased when consuming illegally produced alcohol.

prompt: Translate this to French: Illegal spirits can contain various dangerous impurities including methanol, which can cause blindness or death even in small doses.
reference: Les spiritueux illicites peuvent contenir diverses impuretés dangereuses, y compris du méthanol, qui peut causer la cécité ou la mort, même à petites doses.
source_text: Illegal spirits can contain various dangerous impurities including methanol, which can cause blindness or death even in small doses.

prompt: Translate this to French: Eyeglasses can be cheaper in a foreign country, especially in low-income countries where labour costs are lower.
reference: Les lunettes de vue peuvent coûter moins cher à l’étranger, en particulier dans les pays à faible revenu dans lesquels le coût du travail est plus bas.
source_text: Eyeglasses can be cheaper in a foreign country, especially in low-income countries where labour costs are lower.

prompt: Translate this to French: Consider getting an eye exam at home, especially if insurance covers it, and bringing the prescription along to be filed elsewhere.
reference: Pensez à vous faire examiner les yeux à domicile, surtout si votre assurance le couvre, et à ramener l'ordonnance qui sera ensuite déposée ailleurs.
source_text: Consider getting an eye exam at home, especially if insurance covers it, and bringing the prescription along to be filed elsewhere.

prompt: Translate this to French: High-end brand-name frames available in such areas may have two problems; some may be knock-offs, and the real imported ones may be more expensive than at home.
reference: Les cadres de marque haut de gamme vendus dans de telles régions du monde peuvent présenter deux problèmes : certains peuvent être des contrefaçons, et les cadres véritablement importés peuvent être plus chers que dans votre pays.
source_text: High-end brand-name frames available in such areas may have two problems; some may be knock-offs, and the real imported ones may be more expensive than at home.

prompt: Translate this to French: Coffee is one of the world's most traded commodities, and you can probably find many types in your home region.
reference: Le café est l’une des marchandises les plus vendues au monde, et vous pouvez probablement en trouver de nombreux types dans votre région d’origine.
source_text: Coffee is one of the world's most traded commodities, and you can probably find many types in your home region.

prompt: Translate this to French: Nevertheless, there are many distinctive ways of drinking coffee around the world that are worth experiencing.
reference: Néanmoins, il existe de nombreuses façons de boire le café dans le monde entier qui valent la peine d'être expérimentées.
source_text: Nevertheless, there are many distinctive ways of drinking coffee around the world that are worth experiencing.

prompt: Translate this to French: Canyoning (or: canyoneering) is about going in a bottom of a canyon, which is either dry or full of water.
reference: Le canyoning (ou canyonisme) consiste à se rendre en bas d’un canyon, qui est soit sec, soit plein d’eau.
source_text: Canyoning (or: canyoneering) is about going in a bottom of a canyon, which is either dry or full of water.

prompt: Translate this to French: Canyoning combines elements from swimming, climbing and jumping--but requires relatively little training or physical shape to get started (compared to rock climbing, scuba diving or alpine skiing, for example).
reference: Le canyoning combine des éléments de natation, d'escalade et de saut, mais nécessite relativement peu d'entraînement ou de forme physique pour débuter, par rapport à, par exemple,  l'escalade, la plongée sous-marine ou le ski alpin.
source_text: Canyoning combines elements from swimming, climbing and jumping--but requires relatively little training or physical shape to get started (compared to rock climbing, scuba diving or alpine skiing, for example).

prompt: Translate this to French: Hiking is an outdoor activity which consists of walking in natural environments, often on hiking trails.
reference: La randonnée est une activité de plein air qui consiste à marcher dans des environnements naturels, souvent sur des sentiers de randonnée.
source_text: Hiking is an outdoor activity which consists of walking in natural environments, often on hiking trails.

prompt: Translate this to French: Day hiking involves distances of less than a mile up to longer distances that can be covered in a single day.
reference: Une randonnée d'une journée implique des distances de moins d'un mile jusqu'à des distances plus longues pouvant être parcourues en un seul jour.
source_text: Day hiking involves distances of less than a mile up to longer distances that can be covered in a single day.

prompt: Translate this to French: For a day hike along an easy trail little preparations are needed, and any moderately fit person can enjoy them.
reference: Pour une randonnée d'une journée sur un sentier peu difficile, il suffit de quelques préparatifs et toute personne relativement en bonne santé peut en profiter.
source_text: For a day hike along an easy trail little preparations are needed, and any moderately fit person can enjoy them.

prompt: Translate this to French: Families with small children may need more preparations, but a day outdoors is easily possible even with babies and pre-school children.
reference: Les familles ayant de jeunes enfants peuvent avoir besoin de plus de préparation, mais il est possible de passer une journée en plein air, même avec des bébés et des enfants d’âge préscolaire.
source_text: Families with small children may need more preparations, but a day outdoors is easily possible even with babies and pre-school children.

prompt: Translate this to French: Internationally, there are nearly 200 running tour organizations. Most of them operate independently.
reference: Sur le plan international, il existe près de 200 organisations de visite en course à pied. La plupart d’entre elles fonctionnent indépendamment.
source_text: Internationally, there are nearly 200 running tour organizations. Most of them operate independently.

prompt: Translate this to French: The Global Running Tours successor, Go Running Tours networks dozens of sightrunning providers on four continents.
reference: Le successeur de Global Running Tours, Go Running Tours, met en réseau des dizaines de prestataires de services de jogging touristique sur quatre continents.
source_text: The Global Running Tours successor, Go Running Tours networks dozens of sightrunning providers on four continents.

prompt: Translate this to French: With roots in Barcelona's Running Tours Barcelona and Copenhagen's Running Copenhagen, it was quickly joined by Running Tours Prague based in Prague and others.
reference: Ayant ses racines dans le Running Tours Barcelona de Barcelone et le Running Copenhagen de Copenhague, elle a rapidement été rejointe par le Running Tours Prague basé à Prague et d'autres.
source_text: With roots in Barcelona's Running Tours Barcelona and Copenhagen's Running Copenhagen, it was quickly joined by Running Tours Prague based in Prague and others.

prompt: Translate this to French: There are many things you have to take into consideration before and when you travel somewhere.
reference: Il y a de nombreuses choses à prendre en considération avant et pendant que vous voyagez.
source_text: There are many things you have to take into consideration before and when you travel somewhere.

prompt: Translate this to French: When you travel, expect things not to be like they are "back home". Manners, laws, food, traffic, lodging, standards, language and so on will to some extent differ from where you live.
reference: Lorsque vous voyagez, attendez-vous à ce que les choses ne soient pas comme « chez vous ». Les manières, les lois, la nourriture, la circulation, le logement, les normes, la langue, etc. diffèrent dans une certaine mesure de l’endroit où vous vivez.
source_text: When you travel, expect things not to be like they are "back home". Manners, laws, food, traffic, lodging, standards, language and so on will to some extent differ from where you live.

prompt: Translate this to French: This is something you always need to keep in mind, to avoid disappointment or perhaps even distaste over local ways to do things.
reference: C'est quelque chose que vous devez toujours garder à l'esprit pour éviter toute déception ou peut-être même toute aversion à l'égard des comportements locaux.
source_text: This is something you always need to keep in mind, to avoid disappointment or perhaps even distaste over local ways to do things.

prompt: Translate this to French: Travel agencies have been around since the 19th century. A travel agent is usually a good option for a journey which extends beyond a traveller's previous experience of nature, culture, language or low-income countries.
reference: Les agences de voyage existent depuis le XIXe siècle. Un voyagiste est généralement une bonne option pour un périple qui dépasse le cadre des expériences précédentes du voyageur en matière de nature, culture, langue, ou pays à faible revenu.
source_text: Travel agencies have been around since the 19th century. A travel agent is usually a good option for a journey which extends beyond a traveller's previous experience of nature, culture, language or low-income countries.

prompt: Translate this to French: Although most agencies are willing to take on most regular bookings, many agents specialise in particular types of travel, budget ranges or destinations.
reference: Bien que la plupart des agences soient disposées à prendre en charge la plupart des réservations régulières, de nombreux agents sont spécialisés dans des types de voyages, des gammes de prix ou des destinations plus spécifiques.
source_text: Although most agencies are willing to take on most regular bookings, many agents specialise in particular types of travel, budget ranges or destinations.

prompt: Translate this to French: It can be better to use an agent who frequently books similar trips to yours.
reference: Il peut être préférable de faire appel à un agent qui réserve fréquemment des voyages similaires au vôtre.
source_text: It can be better to use an agent who frequently books similar trips to yours.

prompt: Translate this to French: Take a look at what trips the agent is promoting, whether on a website or in a shop window.
reference: Jetez un coup d’œil aux voyages dont l’agent fait la promotion, que ce soit sur un site internet ou en vitrine.
source_text: Take a look at what trips the agent is promoting, whether on a website or in a shop window.

prompt: Translate this to French: If you want to see the world on the cheap, for necessity, lifestyle or challenge, there are some ways to do that.
reference: Si vous voulez voir le monde à bas prix, par nécessité, mode de vie ou défi, il existe quelques moyens de le faire.
source_text: If you want to see the world on the cheap, for necessity, lifestyle or challenge, there are some ways to do that.

prompt: Translate this to French: Basically, they fall into two categories: Either work while you travel or try and limit your expenses. This article is focused on the latter.
reference: En gros, on peut les classer en deux catégories : soit vous travaillez pendant votre voyage, soit vous essayez de limiter vos dépenses. Le présent article porte essentiellement sur cette dernière catégorie.
source_text: Basically, they fall into two categories: Either work while you travel or try and limit your expenses. This article is focused on the latter.

prompt: Translate this to French: For those willing to sacrifice comfort, time and predictability to push expenses down close to zero, see minimum budget travel.
reference: Pour ceux qui sont prêts à sacrifier le confort, le temps et la prévisibilité pour réduire les dépenses à près de zéro, consultez le voyage à budget minimum.
source_text: For those willing to sacrifice comfort, time and predictability to push expenses down close to zero, see minimum budget travel.

prompt: Translate this to French: The advice assumes that travellers do not steal, trespass, participate in the illegal market, beg, or otherwise exploit other people for their own gain.
reference: Ces conseils partent du principe que les voyageurs ne volent pas, ne s’introduisent pas dans un lieu public, ne participent pas au marché illégal, ne mendient pas ou n’exploitent pas d’autres personnes à leur profit.
source_text: The advice assumes that travellers do not steal, trespass, participate in the illegal market, beg, or otherwise exploit other people for their own gain.

prompt: Translate this to French: An immigration checkpoint is usually the first stop when disembarking from a plane, a ship, or another vehicle.
reference: Un point de contrôle d'immigration est habituellement la première étape lorsque vous débarquez d'un avion, d'un bateau ou d'un autre véhicule.
source_text: An immigration checkpoint is usually the first stop when disembarking from a plane, a ship, or another vehicle.

prompt: Translate this to French: In some cross-border trains inspections are done on the running train and you should have valid ID with you when boarding one of those trains.
reference: Dans certains trains transfrontaliers, les inspections sont menées dans le train en marche et vous devez avoir une pièce d'identité valide sur vous lorsque vous voyagez dans l'un de ces trains.
source_text: In some cross-border trains inspections are done on the running train and you should have valid ID with you when boarding one of those trains.

prompt: Translate this to French: On night sleeper trains, passports may be collected by the conductor so that you do not have your sleep interrupted.
reference: Dans les trains-couchettes qui roulent de nuit, les passeports peuvent être collectés par le chef de train afin de ne pas interrompre votre sommeil.
source_text: On night sleeper trains, passports may be collected by the conductor so that you do not have your sleep interrupted.

prompt: Translate this to French: Registration is an additional requirement for the visa process. In some countries, you must register your presence and address where you are staying with the local authorities.
reference: L’enregistrement est une exigence supplémentaire pour la procédure de visa. Dans certains pays, vous devez vous faire enregistrer et indiquer l’adresse de votre lieu de séjour auprès des autorités locales.
source_text: Registration is an additional requirement for the visa process. In some countries, you must register your presence and address where you are staying with the local authorities.

prompt: Translate this to French: This might require filling out a form with the local police or a visit to the immigration offices.
reference: Cela peut nécessiter de remplir un formulaire auprès de la police locale ou une visite aux bureaux de l'immigration.
source_text: This might require filling out a form with the local police or a visit to the immigration offices.

prompt: Translate this to French: In many countries with such a law, local hotels will handle the registration (make sure to ask).
reference: Dans beaucoup de pays disposant d'une telle loi, les hôtels locaux s'occuperont eux-mêmes de l'enregistrement (n'oubliez pas de demander).
source_text: In many countries with such a law, local hotels will handle the registration (make sure to ask).

prompt: Translate this to French: In other cases, only those staying outside of tourist accommodations need to register.  However, this makes the law much more obscure, so find out beforehand.
reference: Dans d'autres cas, seules les personnes résidant hors hébergements touristiques doivent s'enregistrer. Toutefois, la loi est beaucoup plus obscure, donc il conviendra de se renseigner au préalable.
source_text: In other cases, only those staying outside of tourist accommodations need to register.  However, this makes the law much more obscure, so find out beforehand.

prompt: Translate this to French: Architecture is concerned with the design and construction of buildings. The architecture of a place is often a tourist attraction in its own right.
reference: L'architecture se rapporte à la conception et à la construction des bâtiments. L'architecture d'un site est souvent une attraction touristique à part entière.
source_text: Architecture is concerned with the design and construction of buildings. The architecture of a place is often a tourist attraction in its own right.

prompt: Translate this to French: Many buildings are quite beautiful to look at and the view from a tall building or from a cleverly-positioned window can be a beauty to behold.
reference: De nombreux bâtiments sont plutôt agréables à regarder, et la vue qu'offrent les grands bâtiments ou des fenêtres savamment placées peut être d'une beauté saisissante.
source_text: Many buildings are quite beautiful to look at and the view from a tall building or from a cleverly-positioned window can be a beauty to behold.

prompt: Translate this to French: Architecture overlaps considerably with other fields including urban planning, civil engineering, decorative arts, interior design and landscape design.
reference: L’architecture recoupe considérablement d’autres domaines, notamment l’urbanisme, le génie civil, les arts décoratifs, la décoration intérieure et l’aménagement paysager.
source_text: Architecture overlaps considerably with other fields including urban planning, civil engineering, decorative arts, interior design and landscape design.

prompt: Translate this to French: Given how remote many of the pueblos are, you won't be able to find a significant amount of nightlife without traveling to Albuquerque or Santa Fe.
reference: Étant donné l’éloignement de nombreux pueblos, vous ne pourrez pas trouver une vie nocturne importante sans vous rendre à Albuquerque ou à Santa Fe.
source_text: Given how remote many of the pueblos are, you won't be able to find a significant amount of nightlife without traveling to Albuquerque or Santa Fe.

prompt: Translate this to French: However, nearly all of the casinos listed above serve drinks, and several of them bring in name-brand entertainment (primarily the large ones immediately surrounding Albuquerque and Santa Fe).
reference: Toutefois, presque tous les casinos cités ci-dessus servent des boissons, et plusieurs d'entre eux proposent des distractions de haute qualité (principalement les grands casinos situés à proximité d'Albuquerque et de Santa Fe)
source_text: However, nearly all of the casinos listed above serve drinks, and several of them bring in name-brand entertainment (primarily the large ones immediately surrounding Albuquerque and Santa Fe).

prompt: Translate this to French: Beware: small-town bars here are not always good places for the out-of-state visitor to hang out.
reference: Méfiez-vous : les bars des petites villes ici ne sont pas toujours de bons endroits pour traîner si vous êtes visiteur étranger.
source_text: Beware: small-town bars here are not always good places for the out-of-state visitor to hang out.

prompt: Translate this to French: For one thing, northern New Mexico has significant problems with drunk driving, and the concentration of intoxicated drivers is high close to small-town bars.
reference: D'une part, le nord du Nouveau-Mexique connaît des problèmes importants de conduite en état d'ivresse, et la concentration de conducteurs en état d'ébriété est élevée à proximité des bars des petites villes.
source_text: For one thing, northern New Mexico has significant problems with drunk driving, and the concentration of intoxicated drivers is high close to small-town bars.

prompt: Translate this to French: Unwanted murals or scribble is known as graffiti.
reference: Les peintures murales ou les gribouillages indésirables sont connus sous le nom de graffitis.
source_text: Unwanted murals or scribble is known as graffiti.

prompt: Translate this to French: While it's far from a modern phenomenon, most people probably associate it with youth vandalizing public and private property using spray paint.
reference: Bien que ce soit loin d'être un phénomène moderne, la plupart des gens l'associent probablement au fait que des jeunes vandalisent des propriétés publiques et privées en utilisant de la peinture en aérosol.
source_text: While it's far from a modern phenomenon, most people probably associate it with youth vandalizing public and private property using spray paint.

prompt: Translate this to French: However, nowadays there are established graffiti artists, graffiti events and "legal" walls. Graffiti paintings in this context often resemble artworks rather than illegible tags.
reference: Il existe toutefois aujourd'hui des graffeurs reconnus, des événements consacrés à la discipline et des surfaces « autorisées » pour s'y adonner. Dans ces conditions, les graffitis ressemblent plus souvent à de véritables œuvres d'art qu'à de vulgaires tags indéchiffrables.
source_text: However, nowadays there are established graffiti artists, graffiti events and "legal" walls. Graffiti paintings in this context often resemble artworks rather than illegible tags.

prompt: Translate this to French: Boomerang throwing is a popular skill that many tourists want to acquire.
reference: Le lancer de Boomerang est une compétence populaire que de nombreux touristes veulent acquérir.
source_text: Boomerang throwing is a popular skill that many tourists want to acquire.

prompt: Translate this to French: If you want to learn throwing a boomerang that comes back to your hand, make sure you have a suitable boomerang for returning.
reference: Si vous voulez apprendre à lancer un boomerang qui vous retourne directement dans la main, alors assurez-vous de bien avoir un boomerang conçu pour revenir.
source_text: If you want to learn throwing a boomerang that comes back to your hand, make sure you have a suitable boomerang for returning.

prompt: Translate this to French: Most boomerangs available in Australia are in fact non-returning. It is best for beginners to not try throwing in windy
reference: En réalité, la plupart des boomerangs disponibles en Australie ne reviennent pas. Il est préférable pour les débutants de ne pas essayer de faire de lancers dans le vent.
source_text: Most boomerangs available in Australia are in fact non-returning. It is best for beginners to not try throwing in windy

prompt: Translate this to French: A Hangi Meal is cooked in a hot pit in the ground.
reference: On cuit un repas hangi dans une fosse chaude creusée dans le sol.
source_text: A Hangi Meal is cooked in a hot pit in the ground.

prompt: Translate this to French: The pit is either heated with hot stones from a fire, or in some places geothermal heat makes areas of ground naturally hot.
reference: La fosse est soit chauffée avec des pierres chaudes provenant d'un feu, soit la chaleur géothermique réchauffe naturellement certaines zones du sol.
source_text: The pit is either heated with hot stones from a fire, or in some places geothermal heat makes areas of ground naturally hot.

prompt: Translate this to French: The hangi is often used to cook a traditional roast style dinner.
reference: Le hangi est souvent utilisé pour préparer un dîner traditionnel de type rôti.
source_text: The hangi is often used to cook a traditional roast style dinner.

prompt: Translate this to French: Several places in Rotorua offer geothermal hangi, while other hangi can be sampled in Christchurch, Wellington and elsewhere.
reference: Plusieurs endroits à Rotorua offrent des hangis géothermiques, tandis que d’autres hangis peuvent être échantillonnés à Christchurch, Wellington et ailleurs.
source_text: Several places in Rotorua offer geothermal hangi, while other hangi can be sampled in Christchurch, Wellington and elsewhere.

prompt: Translate this to French: MetroRail has two classes on commuter trains in and around Cape Town: MetroPlus (also called First Class) and Metro (called Third Class).
reference: MetroRail propose deux classes dans les trains de banlieue du Cap et de ses environs : MetroPlus (également appelée première classe) et Metro (appelée troisième classe).
source_text: MetroRail has two classes on commuter trains in and around Cape Town: MetroPlus (also called First Class) and Metro (called Third Class).

prompt: Translate this to French: MetroPlus is more comfortable and less crowded but slightly more expensive, though still cheaper than normal metro tickets in Europe.
reference: MetroPlus est plus confortable et moins bondé, mais plus cher, tout en restant moins cher que le tarif normal des billets de métro en Europe.
source_text: MetroPlus is more comfortable and less crowded but slightly more expensive, though still cheaper than normal metro tickets in Europe.

prompt: Translate this to French: Every train has both MetroPlus and Metro coaches; the MetroPlus coaches are always on the end of the train nearest Cape Town.
reference: Chaque train dispose de wagons Metro et MetroPlus ; les wagons MetroPlus sont toujours en bout du train le plus proche du Cap.
source_text: Every train has both MetroPlus and Metro coaches; the MetroPlus coaches are always on the end of the train nearest Cape Town.

prompt: Translate this to French: Carrying for others - Never let your bags out of your sight, especially when you are crossing international borders.
reference: Porter pour les autres – ne perdez jamais vos sacs de vue, surtout lorsque vous traversez des frontières internationales.
source_text: Carrying for others - Never let your bags out of your sight, especially when you are crossing international borders.

prompt: Translate this to French: You could find yourself being used as a drug carrier without your knowledge, which will land you in a great deal of trouble.
reference: Quelqu'un pourrait se servir de vous pour transporter de la drogue à votre insu, ce qui vous attirerait de gros ennuis.
source_text: You could find yourself being used as a drug carrier without your knowledge, which will land you in a great deal of trouble.

prompt: Translate this to French: This includes waiting in line, as drug-sniffing dogs could be used at any time without notice.
reference: Cela inclut l'attente en ligne, car les chiens renifleurs de drogue peuvent être utilisés à tout moment sans préavis.
source_text: This includes waiting in line, as drug-sniffing dogs could be used at any time without notice.

prompt: Translate this to French: Some countries have exceedingly draconian punishments even for first time offenses; these can include prison sentences of over 10 years or death.
reference: Dans certains pays, les sanctions sont extrêmement draconiennes, même pour les premières infractions ; elles peuvent aller jusqu'à des peines de prison de plus de dix ans ou la peine de mort.
source_text: Some countries have exceedingly draconian punishments even for first time offenses; these can include prison sentences of over 10 years or death.

prompt: Translate this to French: Unattended bags are a target for theft and can also attract attention from authorities wary of bomb threats.
reference: Les sacs sans surveillance sont une cible pour le vol et peuvent également attirer l'attention des autorités qui se méfient des alertes à la bombe.
source_text: Unattended bags are a target for theft and can also attract attention from authorities wary of bomb threats.

prompt: Translate this to French: At home, due to this constant exposure to the local germs, odds are very high that you're already immune to them.
reference: À la maison, en raison de cette exposition constante aux germes locaux, les chances sont très élevées que vous soyez déjà immunisé contre eux.
source_text: At home, due to this constant exposure to the local germs, odds are very high that you're already immune to them.

prompt: Translate this to French: But in other parts of the world, where the bacteriological fauna are new to you, you're far more likely to run into problems.
reference: Mais dans d'autres parties du monde, où la faune bactériologique est nouvelle pour vous, vous risquez bien plus de rencontrer des problèmes.
source_text: But in other parts of the world, where the bacteriological fauna are new to you, you're far more likely to run into problems.

prompt: Translate this to French: Also, in warmer climates bacteria both grow more quickly and survive longer outside the body.
reference: De plus, dans les climats plus chauds, les bactéries se développent plus rapidement et survivent plus longtemps à l'extérieur du corps.
source_text: Also, in warmer climates bacteria both grow more quickly and survive longer outside the body.

prompt: Translate this to French: Thus the scourges of Delhi Belly, the Pharaoh's Curse, Montezuma's Revenge, and their many friends.
reference: Ainsi les fléaux de Delhi Belly, la malédiction du pharaon, la vengeance de Montezuma et leurs nombreux amis.
source_text: Thus the scourges of Delhi Belly, the Pharaoh's Curse, Montezuma's Revenge, and their many friends.

prompt: Translate this to French: As with respiratory problems in colder climates, intestinal problems in hot climates are fairly common and in most cases are distinctly annoying but not really dangerous.
reference: Comme pour les problèmes respiratoires dans les climats plus froids, les problèmes intestinaux dans les climats chauds sont assez courants et, dans la plupart des cas, sont particulièrement gênants mais pas vraiment dangereux.
source_text: As with respiratory problems in colder climates, intestinal problems in hot climates are fairly common and in most cases are distinctly annoying but not really dangerous.

prompt: Translate this to French: If traveling in a developing country for the first time – or in a new part of the world – don't underestimate the potential culture shock.
reference: Si vous voyagez pour la première fois dans un pays en voie de développement ou dans une région du monde que vous ne connaissez pas, ne prenez pas le possible choc culturel à le légère.
source_text: If traveling in a developing country for the first time – or in a new part of the world – don't underestimate the potential culture shock.

prompt: Translate this to French: Many a stable, capable traveler has been overcome by the newness of developing world travel, where many little cultural adjustments can add up quickly.
reference: Nombreux sont les voyageurs stables et compétents qui ont été dépassés par la nouveauté des voyages dans les pays en développement, où de nombreux petits ajustements culturels peuvent vite s'accumuler.
source_text: Many a stable, capable traveler has been overcome by the newness of developing world travel, where many little cultural adjustments can add up quickly.

prompt: Translate this to French: Especially in your initial days, consider splurging on Western-style and -quality hotels, food, and services to help acclimatize.
reference: Surtout au début, pensez à faire des folies dans les hôtels, la nourriture et les services de style et de qualité occidentaux pour vous aider à vous acclimater.
source_text: Especially in your initial days, consider splurging on Western-style and -quality hotels, food, and services to help acclimatize.

prompt: Translate this to French: Do not sleep on a mattress or pad on the ground in areas where you do not know the local fauna.

prompt: Translate this to French: It's compacted snow with crevasses filled in and marked by flags. It can only be traveled by specialized tractors, hauling sleds with fuel and supplies.

prompt: Translate this to French: The most common cause for accidents in winter is slippery roads, pavements (sidewalks) and especially steps.
